There is no justification for the violence and disorder that we saw threatening our communities, nor for those who encouraged it, online or elsewhere.

social.name: Keir Starmer
social.text: RT by @Keir_Starmer: People have been rightly shocked by the brutal attack in north Belfast, but the police must be allowed to do their job so the law can take its course. /1

social.text:
Nigeria’s economy is 6–8 times larger than El Salvador’s.

Even its GDP is eight times bigger than theirs. 

Nigeria is richer than El Salvador, and yet it cannot even boast of having a world-class hospital like this.


Nayib Bukele (@nayibbukele)
